nodes.title: villain
nodes.body: Villain is loose-passive (VPIP 63%, PFR 17%) and folds to hero flop c-bets 8/15 times (53%). River aggression shows up in 5/100 hands (5%). Villain has won 40 of 46 showdowns.

nodes.title: Folds to flop c-bets
nodes.body: Villain has folded to hero flop c-bet 8 times across 15 c-bet opportunities.

nodes.title: Folds to river bets
nodes.body: Villain has folded to hero river bets 4 times across 5 river bet opportunities.

nodes.title: River aggressor
nodes.body: Villain has bet or raised the river in 5 completed hands.
